content:
# Build custom experts with Gems

Gems are your custom AI experts for help on any topic. Gems can be anything from a career coach or brainstorm partner to a coding helper. Get started with our suite of premade Gems, or build your own custom Gems tailored to your unique needs.

## Operate more efficiently

Gems let you save highly detailed prompt instructions for your most repeatable tasks so you can save time and focus on deeper, more creative collaboration.

## Upload your own files

You can give custom Gems the context and resources they need to be truly helpful.

## Personalize your experience

Whether you need a Gem for writing help in a specific tone and style, or expert knowledge on a niche topic, Gems can supercharge your productivity.

## Keep Exploring

Check responses. Subscription and setup required. Availability varies. 18+.

## Change your region and language
